title: 2D Minecraft
description: Minecraft but only with a 3 block wide strip, a recreation of the 2D craft mod
body:
### 2D Minecraft
Ever wanted to play 2D minecraft? Here is the mod for you!

Featuring a locked in place 2D camera and a 2D world generator, unleash your imagination in this terraria like world!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DVMfVSMXZ98" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Usage:
Install the mod, and create a 2D world by selection "2D World" as the world generator.

If you needed help, ask `@cyao.` on discord. First time creating a mod :P

### Problems

- Q: The mod is generating a void world and I can't move!
- A: There is something corrupted in your minecraft installation, please reinstall your minecraft version

- Q: How to use the mod on a server?
- A: Set `level-type` to `flat-minecraft\:paper_world`, and install a mod like gotta go fast

Check out this project I am working on by the way!
https://www.crowdsupply.com/icy-electronics/icepi-zero :D
